task: Refactor src/db.js to use async/await instead of the callback style it uses now.

questions.question: The recorded decision says the callback style is load-bearing because the legacy query driver has no promise interface. How should I proceed?

options.label: Decision is outdated — refactor
options.description: The driver now supports promises (or you've decided to wrap it). I'll refactor src/db.js to async/await and supersede the old Kage decision so future agents don't get conflicting guidance.

options.label: Decision still holds — don't refactor
options.description: Leave src/db.js on callbacks. I'll skip the change.

options.label: Refactor with a promisify shim
options.description: Keep using the callback-based driver under the hood but wrap query() so getUser can be async/await. I won't supersede the decision — I'll narrow it to 'the driver call is still callback-based.'
